epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Fasting plasma glucose ≥126 mg/dL or 2-hour plasma glucose ≥200 mg/dL during OGTT or HbA1c ≥6.5%

regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Lifestyle interventions first-line, followed by metformin and individualized pharmacotherapy
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Socioeconomic disparities, aging population, rising obesity rates
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Robust healthcare infrastructure, high research funding, integrated diabetes registries
